workshop_1_token_convergence.finding: Tokens show U-shaped entropy: improve through depth 4, degrade at depth 8
workshop_1_token_convergence.implication: Later steps may overwrite good intermediate results. Inter-step loss is MANDATORY.

workshop_2_more_recurrence.finding: More steps HURTS with current model (trained for exactly 8)
workshop_2_more_recurrence.implication: v0.6 must be trained from scratch with variable depth, not bolted onto v0.5.4
